prompt: A sleek, photorealistic Chinese tech-announcement poster in Apple advertising style, vertical 4:5 composition, with a dramatic dusk-to-night gradient sky in deep navy blue fading lighter near the horizon. Center the upper body of a middle-aged East Asian man in the foreground, wearing a minimalist black button-up shirt over a black undershirt, standing confidently with a calm executive posture in front of Apple Park’s curved glass architecture. His face is mostly front-facing and slightly turned, with short black hair and thin dark eyeglasses, styled like a serious corporate portrait. Behind him on the right side, place a large glowing white Apple logo floating against the sky. At the very top center, include a small white Apple logo with the Chinese line “Apple 新篇章 由此开启” in a refined thin sans-serif layout. In the top right corner, add large bold red Chinese text: “AI生成”. Across the upper-middle area, place a huge bold white Chinese headline: “罗永浩 接任 Apple CEO”. Directly below it, add a smaller spaced-out white Chinese slogan: “用 工 匠 精 神 ， 让 世 界 再 次 惊 叹”. On the left middle area, add a quoted statement block in dark text with an oversized opening quotation mark, reading: “我不是来改变 Apple， 而是让 Apple 重拾改变世界的勇气。” and beneath it a handwritten-style signature “罗永浩”. Across the lower middle, overlay a translucent dark horizontal feature bar containing exactly 4 icon-and-text columns with thin white line icons: 1) a hammer icon with the title “工匠精神” and subtitle “极致产品主义”, 2) a speech bubble icon with the title “用户至上” and subtitle “体验细节控”, 3) a light bulb icon with the title “创新驱动” and subtitle “重新定义未来”, 4) a heart outline icon with the title “真诚沟通” and subtitle “打造人的科技”. At the very bottom center, add large white English text: “Think Different. Think Again.”, and below it smaller Chinese text: “现在，交给罗永浩。” with another handwritten signature underneath. Use luxury tech keynote poster aesthetics, cinematic soft lighting, glossy reflections on the building, high contrast, clean typography, premium Apple-inspired branding, polished commercial realism.
